action.reasoning: Observation: 67.5% success rate. 6 envs near-solved, 3 at 0% (LockedRoom, MultiRoom, FourRooms low). Analysis: These hard envs need more exploration (higher entropy), longer rollouts, and more training steps. 25M steps took ~95min, so 50M more should take ~3hrs within budget. Decision: Continue training from checkpoint with 50M more steps, higher entropy, more envs per hard task.
